host.dependency_setup: No host packages installed. Ubuntu packages libhackrf-dev 2026.01.3-1, libhackrf0 2026.01.3-1, and libsdl2-dev 2.32.10+dfsg-6 were downloaded and extracted under /tmp; the already-installed libsdl2-2.0-0 2.32.10+dfsg-6 runtime was copied into that temporary sysroot.

build_warnings: GCC 15 warns that the channel HUD snprintf into an 8-byte buffer can truncate for an unconstrained integer channel.
GCC 15 warns that the recording-time HUD snprintf into a 16-byte buffer can truncate for a sufficiently large or negative integer duration.

scope.proved: The recorded unmodified decoder fork point configures, builds all targets, and passes its sole upstream synthetic NTSC CTest on this host.
